channel.title: Jake on Villa de Tara
channel.description: Recent content in Jake on Villa de Tara

item.title: Moving Days
item.description: What a week it has been! After what seems like months of packing all our possessions into boxes, NOMAD turned up on Tuesday to take it all to Peterborough. From there they will transport everything to Patra in Greece and then onward to Villa de Tara via their depot in Chania. The guys did a fantastic job packing the bits we hadn’t (beds, lamps, pictures and mirrors) and loading them into their truck.
